text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, algorithms can produce paintings, compose music, and even write stories. For example, users can type a few words and receive a unique image. While these works can be impressive, many people ask: can machines truly be creative? Human creativity often comes from personal experience, emotion, and intention. AI, on the other hand, learns from existing data and combines patterns. It can surprise us with novel results, but it lacks consciousness. Ultimately, AI is a powerful tool that can inspire human creators, but it does not replace the depth of human imagination.
